title: sullivantia hapemanii var. purpusii
intro: Sullivantia hapemanii var. purpusii, also known as Sullivantia purpusii, is a plant species that belongs to the family Saxifragaceae and is native to Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that help to soothe and protect the skin. The health benefits of Sullivantia purpusii include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and prevent infections. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture, or used in salves and creams to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
